ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnostic parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnostic parameter */,
  "test_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the diagnostic test */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Reference range for the diagnostic parameter */,
  "clinical_significance" TEXT /* Clinical significance of the diagnostic parameter */,
  "param_version" TEXT /* Version of the diagnostic parameter */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the parameter was updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the parameter */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_parameters_test_methodology FOREIGN KEY ("test_methodology") REFERENCES test_methods ("method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_parameters_reference_range FOREIGN KEY ("reference_range") REFERENCES reference_ranges ("range_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_parameters_clinical_significance FOREIGN KEY ("clinical_significance") REFERENCES clinical_significance ("significance_description")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic parameter */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the diagnostic parameter */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity of the diagnostic parameter */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the diagnostic parameter */,
  "youden_index" REAL /* Youden's Index of the diagnostic parameter */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "metric_version" TEXT /* Version of the performance metric */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the metric entry */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the metric entry */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_records" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test record */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic parameter */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who underwent the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the diagnostic test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was performed */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  "conducted_by" TEXT /* User who conducted the test */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the test results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_records_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "insurance_info" TEXT /* Insurance information */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the patient's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the test method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test method */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for the test method */,
  "method_version" TEXT /* Version of the test method */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the method was updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the method */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference range */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic parameter */,
  "range_value" TEXT /* Range value for the diagnostic parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference range */,
  "range_version" TEXT /* Version of the reference range */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the range was updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the range */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_significance" (
  "significance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical significance entry */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic parameter */,
  "significance_description" TEXT /* Description of the clinical significance */,
  "significance_version" TEXT /* Version of the clinical significance */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the significance was updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the significance */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the significance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("significance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic parameter */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used for access */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic parameter */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the report was updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., update, delete, create) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used for the action */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the action session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
